title: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Human Pause

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

human_pause_id.description: Stable identifier for a human-pause artifact.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was created.

severity.description: Severity level for a pause, issue, or recommendation.

trigger.description: Condition that triggered this human pause.

artifact_to_present.description: Artifact that should be shown to the human decision maker.

decision_required.description: Decision the human must make before continuation.

safe_continuation_action.description: Action that is safe after the required decision is made.

automation_may_resume.description: Whether automation may resume after the pause is resolved.

blocks_review_bundle_creation.description: Whether this pause blocks approved review-bundle creation.

related_outcome_id.description: Related stage outcome identifier, when applicable.

description: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Human Pause JSON schema.
